英國英格蘭藍卡爾曼徹斯特
zh.lifeSummary: Katheryn於大約1569年出生在英國。她於大約1590年與Thomas Brooke在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1609年8月在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特享年41歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾曼徹斯特。

英国英格兰藍卡爾曼徹斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Katheryn于大约1569年出生在英国。她于大约1590年与Thomas Brooke在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1609年8月在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特享年41岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾曼徹斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Katheryn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered spelling of Katherine , influenced by the productive name suffix -yn.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: Katheryn was born about 1569, in England. She married Thomas Brooke about 1590, in Manchester, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in August 1609, in Manchester, Lancashire, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Manchester, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Katheryn est née environ 1569, à Angleterre. Elle a épousé Thomas Brooke environ 1590, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en août 1609, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Katheryn wurde um 1569 in England geboren. Sie hat um 1590 in Manchester, Lancashire, England Thomas Brooke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb im August 1609 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Manchester, Lancashire, England und wurde in Manchester, Lancashire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Katheryn è nata il circa 1569 nel England. Lei sposato Thomas Brooke circa 1590, nel Manchester, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel agosto 1609, nel Manchester, Lancashire, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Manchester, Lancashire, England.

ja.Manchester, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスター
イギリスイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスター
ja.lifeSummary: Katherynは約1569年にイギリスで生まれた。約1590年にイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターでThomas Brookeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1609年8月にイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターで41歳で死去し，イギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Katheryn(은)는 대략 1569년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1590년 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 Thomas Brooke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1609년 8월 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 먼체스터에 묻혔다.

Manchester, Lancashire, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Katheryn nasceu aproximadamente 1569, em Inglaterra. Ela casou-se com Thomas Brooke aproximadamente 1590, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em agosto de 1609, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Katheryn родилась около 1569 г. в местности Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Brooke около 1590 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла август 1609 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Katheryn nació aproximadamente 1569, en Inglaterra. Se casó con Thomas Brooke aproximadamente 1590, en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en agosto de 1609, en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
